Trump win fuels stock rally: Nasdaq up 400 points, gold plunges Yahoo Finance Anchor Rachelle Akuffo breaks down the top market stories of the day. All major indexes are in the green as investors react positively to the results of the US presidential election. The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) is up a notable 400 points today. The race for control of the House of Representatives remains in focus. The Democrats have won 181 seats while the Republicans have 199 seats, with 55 seats yet to be called. However, the Republicans have secured a majority in the Senate. Meanwhile, gold (GC=F) prices are falling as investors shift away from the traditional safe-haven asset and embrace the Trump trade instead. Stocks in the green energy sector that were previously buoyed by the prospect of a Democratic victory are now plummeting in the wake of Trumps win. Another stock in the spotlight is Meta Platforms (META) as the Supreme Court is set to hear an appeal from the tech giant regarding a securities fraud lawsuit today. First Solar, AMD, Burlington: 3 stocks on this strategists list As markets (^DJI,^GSPC, ^IXIC) cool from the rally fueled by former President Donald Trumps reelection, F/m Investments senior vice president and senior portfolio manager Francisco Bido joins Wealth! Host Brad Smith to discuss his strategy amid current market conditions ahead of Trumps second term in the White House. Bido indicates he expects the markets choppiness to continue, given ongoing geopolitical uncertainty with Ukraine launching US-made missiles into Russia after receiving the OK from US President Joe Biden, saying, Thats going to be part of life in 2025. The strategist says, I like three companies in particular. I like First Solar (FSLR). I like AMD (AMD). And I like Burlington (BURL). And for different reasons. Bido explains, First Solar is super interesting for me because I think the combination of Trump and Elon Musk is good for solar. He adds, I think AMD is a good buy. You know it has the right earnings and revenue acceleration despite the fact that it just took a little bit of a downturn. The strategist says Burlington is also a good pick because its in the retail space. And if you think about it, Im going a little bit diversified here, poking in all different directions.
